> This repository is in watch mode. Core conceptual expansion PRs are not accepted by default.

## Scope Check

- [ ] This PR only fixes typo/link/format/glossary/machine-readability/de-identification/security/privacy boundary issues.
- [ ] This PR does not expand the core doctrine.
- [ ] This PR does not introduce personal identity traces.
- [ ] This PR does not publish raw conversation logs.
- [ ] This PR does not attribute passages to specific AI vendors, models, accounts, platforms, or chat sessions.
- [ ] This PR preserves release anchors and does not move tags.

## Change Type

- [ ] Typo or formatting repair
- [ ] Broken link
- [ ] Glossary consistency
- [ ] Machine-readability improvement
- [ ] De-identification or privacy boundary
- [ ] Security boundary
- [ ] Contribution-entry repair
- [ ] Release-state clarity

## Summary

What low-risk maintenance issue does this PR fix?

## Files Changed

List the files touched by this PR.

## De-identification Review

Confirm that this PR does not add private identity traces, raw conversations, or platform/model-specific attribution.

## If This Is a Conceptual Expansion

Please close this PR and publish the expansion in a fork or independent repository instead.

Substantial reinterpretations, applications, tools, platforms, governance systems, audit protocols, and ideological expansions are fork-first by default.
